item.title: Has Gujarat Intrux Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Gujarat Intrux Ltd has declared a dividend of 75%, amounting to ₹15 per share, with an ex-date of March 25, 2026. The company has shown strong performance, with total returns of 419.42% over the last 5 years. Time: Mar 20 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Kilitch Drugs?
item.description: Kilitch Drugs has announced a 1:1 bonus issue effective March 24, 2026, meaning shareholders will receive an additional share for each share held. The record date and ex-date for this bonus are both March 24, 2026. Time: Mar 20 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Times Green Ener?
item.description: Times Green Energy India Ltd recently announced a 1:1 bonus issue, with a record and ex-date set for March 24, 2026, meaning shareholders will receive one additional share for each share owned on that date. Time: Mar 20 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: Sar Televenture Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Sar Televenture Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential prolonged bearish trend. This development comes amid deteriorating price momentum and weak fundamentals, raising concerns about the stock’s near- and long-term outlook. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: GSM Foils Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: GSM Foils Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non - Ferrous Metals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average crossed below the 200-day moving average. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term trend and signalling caution for investors. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: IIFL Capital Services Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: IIFL Capital Services Ltd, a prominent player in the Capital Markets sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: AKG Exim Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: AKG Exim Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and long-term weakness in the stock’s price action. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Silly Monks Entertainment Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum amid ongoing sector challenges and weak fundamentals. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd, a leading player in the Indian automobile sector, has recently formed a Death Cross—a technical event where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average—indicating a potential shift towards a bearish trend and signalling a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Tech Mahindra Ltd. Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Tech Mahindra Ltd., a prominent player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Balkrishna Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Balkrishna Industries Ltd, a prominent player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: Ador Welding Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Ador Welding Ltd, a small-cap player in the Other Industrial Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's near- to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 20 2026 06:20 PM IST
